data.description:

NatWest Group ( (NWG) ) has provided an announcement.

NatWest Group plc disclosed that The Capital Group Companies, Inc., a major U.S.-based investment management group, has reduced its holding in NatWest to 4.991397% of voting rights as of 24 March 2026, from a previous level of 5.005597%. The position, comprising 1,592,753,108 voting rights across common stock and depository receipts and held on behalf of client accounts rather than for Capital Group’s own account, means the investor has slipped just below the 5% UK disclosure threshold, a marginal change that signals continued but slightly diminished institutional support for NatWest’s shareholder base.

The most recent analyst rating on (NWG) stock is a Hold with a $15.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NatWest Group stock, see the NWG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NWG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NWG is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by mid-range financial performance—good profitability and an improving balance sheet, but weighed down by volatile revenue and inconsistent cash flow. Technicals are weak with bearish trend signals despite oversold readings. Valuation is a clear positive with a low P/E and supported dividend yield, while the earnings call was constructive on returns and capital generation but highlighted meaningful macro, regulatory, and acquisition execution risks.

To see Spark’s full report on NWG stock, click here.

More about NatWest Group

NatWest Group plc is a UK-based banking and financial services group headquartered in London, providing retail, commercial and institutional banking services primarily in the UK and Western Europe. The group focuses on lending, deposit-taking, payments and wealth management, and is a major listed issuer of common stock and depository receipts in international capital markets.

data.title: Novo Nordisk AGM Backs 2025 Dividend, Expands Capital Mandates and Refreshes Board
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Novo Nordisk ( (NVO) ).

Novo Nordisk held its Annual General Meeting in Bagsværd, Denmark, on 26 March 2026, approving the 2025 statutory annual report, profit distribution and a total 2025 dividend of DKK 11.70 per A and B share, including a final DKK 7.95 to be paid in March 2026. Shareholders backed the 2025 remuneration report, set Board pay for 2026 and endorsed continued capital flexibility through an authorisation to repurchase up to 10% of share capital and an extended mandate to increase capital until April 2028.

The meeting re-elected chair Lars Rebien Sørensen, vice chair Cees de Jong and several directors, added three new board members, and re-appointed Deloitte for financial and sustainability audits, while shifting general meeting venue rules to the Region of Eastern Denmark. Following the AGM, the Board reshaped its committee structure and confirmed that Poul Weihrauch will serve as a board observer for 2026/27 ahead of a planned nomination in 2027, signalling continuity and gradual renewal in governance as Novo Nordisk navigates what it described as a transformative period after 2025.

The most recent analyst rating on (NVO) stock is a Hold with a $40.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Novo Nordisk stock, see the NVO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NVO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NVO is a Neutral.

The score reflects strong underlying financial quality and attractive valuation, partially offset by a very weak technical setup (downtrend across all key moving averages) and a cautious near-term outlook from management, including guidance for declining 2026 sales and operating profit amid pricing and policy headwinds.

To see Spark’s full report on NVO stock, click here.

More about Novo Nordisk

Novo Nordisk is a leading global healthcare company founded in 1923 and headquartered in Denmark, specialising in treatments for serious chronic diseases, particularly diabetes. The group focuses on scientific innovation, expanding access to medicines and prevention, employs about 68,800 people in 80 countries, and markets its products in roughly 170 countries, with listings in Copenhagen and New York.

data.title: Valneva Showcases Chikungunya Vaccine Progress at World Vaccine Congress in Washington
data.description:

Valneva ( (VALN) ) has provided an update.

On March 26, 2026, Valneva SE announced it will have a significant presence at the 26th World Vaccine Congress in Washington, D.C., taking place from March 31 to April 2, 2026. Led by CEO Thomas Lingelbach, senior executives will participate in multiple sessions and host an exhibition booth to engage with existing and prospective partners, underscoring the company’s drive to expand its commercial and strategic relationships in the global vaccine market.

During the conference, Vice President of Clinical Development Susanne Eder-Lingelbach is scheduled to present updates on Phase IV and real-world evidence studies for Valneva’s single-shot chikungunya vaccine IXCHIQ on April 1, 2026. The company highlighted that more than 12,000 people have already been vaccinated in a pilot campaign in Brazil with partner Instituto Butantan, while Chief Medical Officer Dr. Juan Carlos Jaramillo will join a high-level panel on chikungunya and mosquito-borne vaccines, reinforcing Valneva’s positioning as a key player in emerging arboviral vaccine markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (VALN) stock is a Hold with a $6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Valneva stock, see the VALN Stock Forecast page.

The group applies multiple vaccine modalities to deliver first-, best- or only-in-class products, currently markets three proprietary travel vaccines, and is advancing a pipeline that includes the only Lyme disease vaccine candidate in advanced clinical development with Pfizer and a leading Shigella vaccine candidate.

data.title: SK Telecom Moves to Fully Acquire SK Broadband via Cash Share Exchange
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Sk Telecom ( (SKM) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 26, 2026, SK Telecom’s board approved a cash-based share exchange to acquire all remaining shares of its fixed-line unit SK Broadband, turning it into a wholly owned subsidiary. The transaction values SK Broadband minority shares at 15,032 won per common share, with a share exchange ratio set at 1 SK Telecom to 0.1916882 SK Broadband, based on Korean securities law valuation methods.

SK Telecom will use its reference market price of 78,419 won per share, which exceeds its asset value, while SK Broadband’s price is derived from intrinsic value combining asset and profit metrics. An external appraisal by Deloitte Anjin, completed between March 3 and March 26, 2026, deemed the exchange ratio appropriate, and SK Telecom expects full ownership to improve management efficiency, enhance strategic flexibility and business synergies, and ultimately boost overall corporate value.

The most recent analyst rating on (SKM) stock is a Buy with a $31.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sk Telecom stock, see the SKM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SKM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SKM is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by the sharp profitability and return deterioration and a cautious earnings-call outlook tied to cybersecurity-related impacts, penalties, and subscriber pressure. Solid cash generation and a generally supported balance sheet help offset these risks, while technicals are mixed (short-term weakness but longer-term support) and valuation looks demanding given the earnings compression despite a moderate dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on SKM stock, click here.

More about Sk Telecom

SK Telecom Co., Ltd. is a leading South Korean telecommunications operator, historically focused on mobile services and increasingly active across converged connectivity and digital platforms. Its subsidiary SK Broadband Co., Ltd. provides fixed-line telecommunications services, positioning the group as an integrated provider across wireless and wireline networks in the Korean market.

data.title: Lianhe Sowell Clarifies Nasdaq Governance Exemption in March 26 Filing
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Lianhe Sowell International Group Ltd. ( (LHSW) ) has provided an update.

Lianhe Sowell International Group Ltd., a Cayman Islands–incorporated foreign private issuer listed on Nasdaq and based in Shenzhen, clarified its use of the home country rule exemption in a March 26, 2026 filing. The company said that, consistent with Cayman Islands law and its own constitutional documents, it is allowed to depart from certain Nasdaq corporate governance requirements.

In the filing, the company confirmed it has elected to be exempt from Nasdaq Rule 5635, which otherwise requires shareholder approval for significant share issuances, change-of-control deals and certain equity compensation plans. It emphasized that, aside from this exemption, its corporate governance practices do not materially differ from those of typical U.S. domestic companies on the Nasdaq market, signaling continuity for investors while preserving flexibility on future securities issuances.

The most recent analyst rating on (LHSW) stock is a Hold with a $0.16 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lianhe Sowell International Group Ltd. stock, see the LHSW Stock Forecast page.

The score is primarily supported by improving profitability and a stable, conservatively leveraged balance sheet, but it is held back by negative operating/free cash flow and weak technical signals (price well below key moving averages with negative MACD). Valuation provides limited support due to an unusable P/E value and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on LHSW stock, click here.

More about Lianhe Sowell International Group Ltd.

Lianhe Sowell International Group Ltd. is a Cayman Islands–incorporated foreign private issuer listed on Nasdaq and headquartered in Shenzhen, China. The company follows Cayman Islands corporate governance practices where permitted under Nasdaq rules, while otherwise aligning its governance framework with the standards applied to U.S. domestic issuers.

data.title: Global Acquisitions Extends CEO Contract, Adopts 2026 Equity Plan
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Global Acquisitions Corporation ( (AASP) ) is now available.

Global Acquisitions Corporation entered into an executive employment agreement with Chief Executive Officer Ronald S. Boreta, dated March 25, 2026 and effective March 1, 2026, extending his leadership for five years with automatic one-year renewals. The pact sets a $270,000 base salary with automatic 10% annual increases, a $250,000 cash sign-on bonus that remains unpaid, potential cash and equity bonuses, strict non-compete and non-solicitation covenants, and a detailed severance and change-of-control package that could significantly increase Boreta’s payout if he is terminated without cause or resigns for good reason.

The agreement outlines substantial acceleration of vesting and cash severance in cases of death, disability, good‑reason resignation, termination without cause or certain change-of-control events, reinforcing Boreta’s job security while limiting his ability to compete or solicit staff and customers for 12 months post‑employment. On March 23, 2026, the board also adopted the Agassi Sports Entertainment Corp. 2026 Equity Incentive Plan, authorizing 1.5 million shares for a broad range of stock-based awards to employees, directors and consultants, which strengthens the company’s ability to use equity compensation for retention and alignment but may dilute existing shareholders as awards are granted.

The 2026 Plan, administered by the board or a compensation committee, permits nonqualified stock options, restricted stock, RSUs, stock appreciation rights, performance awards and other equity-linked grants with market-based exercise pricing and flexible vesting terms. It includes customary provisions for corporate transactions and changes in control, allowing for assumption, substitution or accelerated vesting of awards, and gives the administrator repricing and redesign authority, thereby providing a powerful capital markets and incentive tool that could influence the firm’s cost of compensation and ownership structure over time.

More about Global Acquisitions Corporation

Global Acquisitions Corporation, operating through Agassi Sports Entertainment Corp., appears focused on developing and operating sports and entertainment-related businesses. The company uses equity-based compensation to attract and retain executives, employees, directors and consultants, signaling a growth-oriented corporate strategy and reliance on stock incentives to align stakeholder interests.

Average Trading Volume: 2,365

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

The latest announcement is out from Mills Music ( (MMTRS) ).

Mills Music Trust, a royalty trust whose income derives from a music copyright catalogue administered by Sony Music Publishing, distributes contingent royalty-related payments to its Unit Holders after deducting administrative costs and expenses. Its Trust Units provide investors exposure to music royalty cash flows rather than an operating business.

On March 25, 2026, Mills Music Trust reported that it received a total Q4 2025 payment of $424,170 from Sony, including a $241,647 contingent portion, a $92,550 true-up for Q3 2025, and an $89,973 additional Q4 amount later identified as an overpayment. After $78,865 in expenses, $345,295, or $1.2434 per Unit, was distributed to Unit Holders of record as of March 24, 2026, while Sony plans to recoup the $89,973 overpayment by offsetting future quarter payments, affecting upcoming distributions.

More about Mills Music

Mills Music Trust is a royalty trust that holds a copyright catalogue generating music publishing income, with payments administered via Sony Music Publishing. The trust distributes contingent purchase price payments and related royalty income to holders of its Trust Units, while deducting administrative fees and maintaining reserves for potential future liabilities.

Global Technologies ( (GTLL) ) has issued an update.

Global Technologies, LTD, a public multi-operational company in digital health, wellness, and technology, builds scalable businesses through acquisitions, strategic licensing, and integrated platforms to deliver innovative solutions and long-term shareholder value. Its portfolio is structured around core subsidiaries targeting sales growth, client expansion, and revenue development across technology-enabled health and wellness markets.

On March 26, 2026, Global Technologies announced it had completed a comprehensive two-year independent audit, restated its 2024 financial statements, and filed its outstanding quarterly reports through December 31, 2025, bringing all SEC reporting obligations current. By engaging a new PCAOB-registered auditor after its prior auditor lost registration and voluntarily exceeding minimum regulatory requirements, the company strengthened internal controls, enhanced financial transparency, and aims to bolster investor confidence and market visibility.

Management framed the formal confirmation of current SEC reporting status as a key governance milestone that had previously been shared only via social media, underscoring a renewed emphasis on clear and accessible disclosure. With audited financials, current filings, and reinforced oversight in place, Global Technologies signaled a stronger operational footing that may influence stakeholder perceptions as it continues executing its growth strategy across its core technology and health-focused subsidiaries.

Haymaker Acquisition Corp. 4, a special purpose acquisition company, is pursuing a business combination with Suncrete, Inc. and Concrete Partners Holding, LLC through a newly formed public company, PubCo, as part of its strategy to bring an operating business to the public markets. The latest update is out from TON Strategy Company ( (TONX) ).

TON Strategy Company has scheduled its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders for June 9, 2026, with stockholders of record as of the close of business on April 15, 2026 entitled to vote. The time and location will be detailed in the company’s definitive proxy statement for the meeting.

Because the 2026 meeting will occur more than 30 days before the prior year’s meeting date, the company has reset deadlines for shareholder governance actions. Proposals for inclusion in the proxy under Rule 14a-8, as well as other bylaw-based proposals, director nominations, and universal proxy-related notices, must be received at the company’s principal executive offices by the close of business on April 6, 2026 and must comply with applicable SEC rules and the company’s bylaws.

data.title: Microbot Medical Showcases Landmark Robotic Endovascular Procedures
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Microbot Medical ( (MBOT) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 26, 2026, Emory Healthcare and Microbot Medical announced that Emory interventional radiologists successfully performed robotic peripheral endovascular procedures using Microbot’s LIBERTY Endovascular Robotic System. The cases included the world’s first robotic prostatic artery embolization for benign prostatic hyperplasia and the first robotic Y-90 radioembolization mapping for liver cancer, demonstrating the system’s use across multiple complex indications.

Clinicians reported that LIBERTY improved navigation in challenging anatomy and enabled more precise, personalized treatment delivery, while aiming to reduce radiation exposure and physical strain and improve procedural efficiency. The milestone follows the limited market release of LIBERTY in November 2025 and precedes its planned full market launch in April 2026, underscoring growing clinical adoption that could strengthen Microbot’s position in the endovascular robotics market and expand patient access to minimally invasive care.

The most recent analyst rating on (MBOT) stock is a Buy with a $12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Microbot Medical stock, see the MBOT Stock Forecast page.

More about Microbot Medical

Microbot Medical Inc. is a commercial-stage medical device company specializing in advanced robotic technology for endovascular procedures. Its flagship product, the LIBERTY Endovascular Robotic System, is the world’s first FDA-cleared, single-use, remotely operated robotic solution for peripheral endovascular interventions, targeting greater precision, efficiency and safety in vascular care.

On March 26, 2026, Quantum BioPharma announced the appointment of leading multiple sclerosis specialist Dr. Salvatore Napoli as Principal Investigator for its planned Phase 2 clinical trial of Lucid-MS, an investigational neuroprotective therapy targeting demyelination in MS. The company plans to submit an IND to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration in the coming weeks, positioning Lucid-MS to enter mid-stage clinical testing and underscoring Quantum BioPharma’s strategic push into first-in-class, non-immunomodulatory MS treatments that could enhance its standing in the neurodegenerative disease market.

Lucid-MS, a first-in-class, non-immunomodulatory compound that has shown preclinical efficacy in preventing demyelination, is central to Quantum BioPharma’s growth strategy in MS and related neurodegenerative conditions. By securing an internationally recognized MS expert to lead the upcoming study, the company strengthens the clinical and scientific profile of the program, a move that could be significant for investors and patients if the Phase 2 trial demonstrates meaningful safety and efficacy outcomes.

More about Quantum Biopharma

Quantum BioPharma Ltd. is a Toronto-based biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative treatments for neurodegenerative and metabolic disorders, as well as alcohol misuse. Its lead asset, Lucid-MS (Lucid-21-302), is a patented new chemical entity designed to prevent and reverse myelin degradation in multiple sclerosis, and it also holds economic interests in the consumer product UNBUZZD and a portfolio of secured strategic investments.

Flowserve ( (FLS) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 26, 2026, Flowserve announced that Lamar Duhon has resigned as president of its Flowserve Pumps Division, effective April 10, 2026, to become CEO of a privately held company, and will be succeeded on April 11, 2026, by Matthew Klopfer, currently vice president of strategic business management for the division and former leader of its industrial pumps unit, where he drove margin expansion and improved on-time delivery. The company also disclosed that Chief Accounting Officer Scott Vopni plans to retire on June 30, 2026, and has launched a search for his successor, with Chief Financial Officer Amy Schwetz set to serve as interim chief accounting officer if a permanent replacement is not in place by his departure, signaling a managed leadership transition in key operational and financial roles.

data.title: The Dixie Group Updates Investor Presentation, Highlights 2026 Strategy
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from The Dixie Group ( (DXYN) ) is now available.

In March 2026, The Dixie Group published updated investor presentation materials outlining its history, current positioning and recent performance in the residential flooring market, which is driven by remodeling, existing home sales and new construction. The company emphasized its concentration in the upper-end residential replacement segment, its diversified customer base and its design-led sales force serving independent floor covering retailers and designers.

The presentation detailed recent brand initiatives, including the 2023 rebranding of Dixie Home to DH Floors, expansion of DuraSilk SD Pet Solutions polyester offerings and 2024 growth plans across EnVision nylon platforms, TRUCOR hard surface lines and Fabrica’s 50th anniversary initiatives. Management also reviewed business challenges from 2021 to 2025, including the loss of its largest mass merchant customer, raw material disruptions, freight inflation, restructuring actions and softer industry demand tied to higher mortgage rates and weak existing home sales.

Dixie outlined cost reduction plans for 2026, largely stemming from restructuring and efficiency measures implemented in late 2025, and signaled expectations for margin improvement as extrusion and plant volumes normalize. The company’s strategy positions it to benefit when housing activity and consumer confidence recover, aiming to leverage pent-up demand with its high-end brands and broadened product portfolio across carpet and hard surface categories.

The most recent analyst rating on (DXYN) stock is a Hold with a $0.43 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on The Dixie Group stock, see the DXYN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on DXYN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DXYN is a Neutral.

The overall stock score of 42 reflects significant financial challenges, weak technical indicators, and concerning valuation metrics. While there are some positive developments in operational efficiency and market focus, the persistent financial instability and bearish technical signals weigh heavily on the stock’s attractiveness.

To see Spark’s full report on DXYN stock, click here.

More about The Dixie Group

The Dixie Group, Inc. is a U.S. floorcovering manufacturer focused on the mid- to high-end residential market, selling primarily through specialty retailers and designer-driven channels. Its portfolio spans carpet, rugs, luxury vinyl, engineered wood and high-performance laminate under brands including DH Floors, Masland, Fabrica, TRUCOR and Décor by Fabrica, with strategy centered on design, quality and upper-end consumers rather than manufacturing scale.

data.title: Worthington Steel Posts Q3 Results, Pursues Kloeckner Acquisition
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Worthington Steel, Inc. ( (WS) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 25, 2026, Worthington Steel reported fiscal third‑quarter 2026 results for the period ended February 28, 2026, showing net sales up 12% year over year to $769.8 million, driven by higher direct volumes and selling prices, but operating income fell sharply to $3.1 million amid lower toll volumes and a $22.9 million increase in SG&A. Net earnings attributable to controlling interest declined to $10.4 million, or $0.20 per diluted share, while adjusted EPS was $0.27, and the company highlighted challenging macroeconomic conditions and an unfavorable contribution from the recently acquired Sitem Group.

During the quarter, Worthington Steel entered into a business combination agreement with German metals processor Kloeckner & Co SE and launched a public tender offer for all outstanding Kloeckner shares at €11 per share, positioning the deal as transformational for its long‑term growth and value creation. The board also declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.16 per share on March 25, 2026, payable June 26, 2026, underscoring an ongoing commitment to shareholder returns despite margin pressure from weaker toll processing demand and the closure of its Cleveland‑area WSCP facility in May 2025.

The most recent analyst rating on (WS) stock is a Buy with a $46.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Worthington Steel, Inc. stock, see the WS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WS is a Neutral.

The score is anchored by solid financial fundamentals (low leverage and strong cash conversion) and a constructive earnings update with market-share gains. These are meaningfully offset by weak technicals (bearish momentum and price below key moving averages) and a valuation that is not especially discounted for cyclicality, with M&A adding upside but also integration/financing risk.

To see Spark’s full report on WS stock, click here.

More about Worthington Steel, Inc.

Worthington Steel, Inc., based in Columbus, Ohio, is a market‑leading, value‑added metals processing company focused on direct and toll steel processing for customers in North America and Europe. The business sells processed steel products with an emphasis on direct volumes and spreads, and it has been expanding its footprint through acquisitions such as Sitem Group and a proposed combination with Germany’s Kloeckner & Co SE.
